name: Chocolate Chips Thumbprint Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup HERSHEY'S Semi-Sweet Chocolate Chips, divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small microwave-safe bowl, place 1/4 cup of chocolate chips. Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 20-30 seconds or until the chocolate is melted and smooth when stirred. Set aside to cool slightly.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine butter, shortening, sugar, reserved melted chocolate, egg yolk, and vanilla. Blend well.
4. Stir in flour and salt. Roll dough into 1-inch balls.
5. With a fork, lightly beat the egg white. Dip each ball into the egg white, then roll in chopped nuts.
6. Place the balls on an ungreased cookie sheet about 1 inch apart.
7. Press the center of each ball with a thumb to make indentations.
8. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until set. Remove from oven and immediately place several of the remaining 3/4 cup chocolate chips in the center of each cookie.
9. Gently remove cookies from the sheet to a wire rack. After a few minutes, swirl the melted chocolate in each thumbprint.
10. Makes about 2 1/2 dozen cookies.
